I have an HP Elitedesk 800 G1 SFF pc and i want to know the list of compatible GPUs.

I am on a tight budget, but at the same time, I want the best I can get, I want to avoid any problem with the power supply I have, and also avoid any problem with the case.

Category:
  • Graphics Card Upgrade
Reply
I have the same question
1 REPLY 1
NonSequitur777
10,541 3,962 1,505
Level 13

‎01-24-2025 11:45 AM - edited ‎01-24-2025 11:46 AM

@askerforhelp,

 

Welcome to our HP Community forum!

 

Look, you can make just about any graphics card work on an HP EliteDesk 800 G1 SFF system, as you can see here, as there are ways to 'mod' this system to allow for higher wattage power supplies, etc.

 

With the stock 240-watt power supply, the pickings are limited.

 

You can get away with graphics cards up to, say, 75-watt TDP, such as these (from mediocre to best):

 

GT 1030 Low Profile: GIGABYTE GT 1030 Low Profile Specs | TechPowerUp GPU Database

 

RX 550 Low Profile: Sapphire RX 550 Low Profile 4 GB Specs | TechPowerUp GPU Database

 

RX 6400 Low Profile: PowerColor RX 6400 Low Profile Specs | TechPowerUp GPU Database

 

GTX 1050 Low Profile: GIGABYTE GTX 1050 Low Profile Specs | TechPowerUp GPU Database

 

GTX 1050 Ti Low Profile: MSI GTX 1050 Ti LP Specs | TechPowerUp GPU Database

 

Dell AMD Radeon RX 6500: Meet the Dell AMD Radeon RX 6500: Fastest Single-Slot LP AMD GPU? - YouTube

 

GTX 1650 Low Profile: MSI GTX 1650 Low Profile Specs | TechPowerUp GPU Database

 

Kind Regards,

 

NonSequitur777
